name: domain-drop-watcher-template
description: Watch domains for drop/release events and alert when available. Multi-user dashboard, magic-link + passkey auth.

DB.description: D1 database for users, domains, alerts, audit events

EVENTS.description: KV namespace for transient event log

BOOTSTRAP.description: KV namespace for first-run admin token

EMAIL.description: Send Email binding for magic-link sign-in
